title: InitData
description:
`init` — create this folder's `topos.toml` (the project manifest `add`/`remove` edit and
`update`/`status` resolve). **INFERRED** (additive-only).

created.description: `false` when one already existed (the no-op receipt).

note.description: A placement note (outside a git repo the file will not travel — stated honestly).
